---
title: "Preliminaries on Computability and Algorithmic Information Theory"
date: 2026-03-03
toc: false
page-layout: full
---

[Download the PDF](algorithmic-information-theory.pdf)

::: {.pdf-embed}
<object data="algorithmic-information-theory.pdf" type="application/pdf" width="100%" height="900">
  <p>Your browser can’t display PDFs inline. <a href="algorithmic-information-theory.pdf">Download the PDF</a>.</p>
</object>
:::

<details>
<summary>HTML version (rough)</summary>

[Open the HTML version](html.qmd)

</details>
